title: gladiolus nemorosus
intro: Gladiolus nemorosus, also known as the woodland sword lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. Native to southern Europe, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to aid in wound healing and skin conditions, offering benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Gladiolus nemorosus is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves, and is also used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
